titleStmt.title: SII 22.162: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 162. (A.R. No. 162 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME (THIRD) PRĀKĀRA. KAMPAṆA-UḌAIYAR—PRAMĀDI, (KAMPA II)—A.D. 1373-74.

summary.p: This records a gift of five cows to the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍaruḷiya-Nāyanār for the sacred pañchagavya bath of the god by a certain Kāḷattināthaṉ a son of Kachchiyarāyar (or family ?) of Paruvūr.

Close to this is another inscription dated in the cyclic year Śubhakṛit (A.D. 1362-63 ?) which records a gift of two pieces of land measuring together 550 kuḻi in extent, for a perpetual lamp in the temple, by one Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyān Tirumuḍikkāri of Śīdēvi village adjoining Śīkkāḍu by order of Goppaṇṇa-Uḍaiyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmaṉu māmaṇṭalicuraṉ Ari
rācavipāṭa pācaikku tappuvarāyar kaṇ
ṭa śrī kampaṇauṭaiyaṟku tiruvirācciya
m cellāniṉṟa piṟamāti varuṣam Uṭai
yār (uṭaiyār) Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷiya nā
yaṉāṟku pañcakevikam Āṭiaruḷa paruvūṟ kacciyarā
yar piḷḷaikaḷil kāḷattinātaṉ viṭṭa pacu Iraṇ
ṭum kaṉṟu tāyppacu muṉṟum Ākappacu Añ
cum cantiṟātittavaraiyum Āṭiaruḷa Itu
mākecurar rakṣai . (ā ṟ ṇo 162-ā Of 1906)
Uṭaiyār Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷiya nāyaṉāṟku
śubhakṛt varuṣam paṅkuṉi mātam 10 5 tiyati koppaṇṇa
uṭaiyar nirupappaṭikku cikkāṭṭuppaṟṟil citeviyil
vāṇātarāyaṉ Entalil piṟaiuṭaiyāṉ tiruvekam
pam Uṭaiyāṉ tirumuṭikkāri kuṭiniṅkāta tiruviḷakku
ppuṟa Iṟaiyiliāka viṭṭa tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku
vāṇātarāyaṉ taṭi Oṉṟu kuḻi 3 100 3 10- m piṟaiuṭaiyāṉ
taṭi Oṉṟu kuḻi 2 100 2 10- m vaṭamelai mūlai kiṇaṟum viṭṭeṉ
Itu tirumuṭikkāriyeṉ panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.162 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
